--- a/train_all.py
+++ b/train_all.py
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+import os

+import sys

+import time

+import subprocess

+import multiprocessing as mp

+

+TASKS = [

+    'h1hand-walk-v0',

+    'h1hand-stand-v0',

+    'h1hand-run-v0',

+    'h1hand-sit_simple-v0',

+    'h1hand-balance_simple-v0',

+    'h1hand-reach-v0',

+    'h1hand-push-v0',

+    'h1hand-pole-v0',

+    'h1hand-door-v0',

+    'h1hand-package-v0',

+]

+

+def train_one(task, steps, n_envs):

+    save_dir = f'ckpt/{task}'

+    log_file = f'logs/train_{task}.log'

+    os.makedirs('logs', exist_ok=True)

+    with open(log_file, 'w') as lf:

+        p = subprocess.Popen(

+            ['python', 'train.py', '--task', task, '--steps', str(steps),

+             '--save_dir', save_dir, '--n_envs', str(n_envs)],

+            stdout=lf, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,

+        )

+        p.wait()

+    return task, p.returncode

+

+if __name__ == '__main__':

+    import argparse

+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()

+    ap.add_argument('--steps', type=int, default=150000)

+    ap.add_argument('--n_envs', type=int, default=4)

+    ap.add_argument('--tasks', nargs='*', default=None)

+    args = ap.parse_args()

+

+    tasks = args.tasks if args.tasks else TASKS

+    print(f'Training {len(tasks)} tasks: {tasks}', flush=True)

+    t0 = time.time()

+

+    # Run all tasks in parallel

+    procs = []

+    for task in tasks:

+        save_dir = f'ckpt/{task}'

+        os.makedirs(save_dir, exist_ok=True)

+        os.makedirs('logs', exist_ok=True)

+        log_file = f'logs/train_{task}.log'

+        lf = open(log_file, 'w')

+        p = subprocess.Popen(

+            ['python', 'train.py', '--task', task, '--steps', str(args.steps),

+             '--save_dir', save_dir, '--n_envs', str(args.n_envs)],

+            stdout=lf, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,

+        )

+        procs.append((task, p, lf))

+        print(f'  launched {task} (pid={p.pid})', flush=True)

+        time.sleep(2)  # stagger startup

+

+    # Wait for all

+    results = []

+    for task, p, lf in procs:

+        rc = p.wait()

+        lf.close()

+        results.append((task, rc))

+        print(f'  done {task} rc={rc} elapsed={time.time()-t0:.0f}s', flush=True)

+

+    print(f'All done in {time.time()-t0:.0f}s', flush=True)

+    for task, rc in results:

+        print(f'  {task}: rc={rc}')
